title: Thai Fluffy Beef Fillet
description: A flavorful and tender Thai-inspired beef fillet dish, perfect for a quick dinner. This recipe combines the richness of fatty flavors with the freshness of Thai spices.
instructions: Season the beef fillet with salt and pepper.
Heat the fatty tong and ko oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the beef fillet for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and cook for 15-20 minutes or until the beef reaches your desired level of doneness.
Remove the skillet from the oven and let the beef rest for 5 minutes.
Serve the beef fillet with the Thai fluffy pa on the side.
